svg.text: TRAINING ON GKE: TEXT-TO-SQL WITH GEMMA 3 1B
Each training step flows through the cluster. Eval steps (green) activate the inference path.
Drains Redis each clock cycle. Adapter swap = pointer flip. Per-tenant optimizer state.
Results pushed to Redis. At eval steps: saves weights to shared storage for vLLM inference.
GPU: nvidia-l4 · port 8001 · inference only · active at eval steps
SELECT e.name FROM employees e JOIN departments d
No manual GPU alloc. Pods auto-scheduled.
Crashed? K8s restarts. No SSH needed.
1 base model + N adapters on 1 GPU.
Local dev -> GKE prod, no rewrite.
